policy: Schedule the finding, gate the fixing. Every routine OPENS a draft PR or an issue with findings; none auto-merges, and none auto-applies a generative refactor (empirically cosmetic + scope-creep). Stack-specific routines run only where the stack is present (affectedness, by marker file). model is illustrative — pick per task class.

routines.name: convergence-weekly
routines.description: Whole-repo health triage: scorecard hotspots + structural audits, ranked by churn*complexity, synthesized into docs/health/<scope>/findings.md. Opens a draft PR. Never applies a refactor.

routines.name: security-weekly
routines.description: Security + observability sweep; severity-ranked findings as an issue.

routines.name: docs-drift-weekly
routines.description: Catch README/AGENTS/docs that drifted from the code (commands, flags, paths, examples).

routines.name: rust-contracts
routines.description: Runs only on repos with Cargo.toml (affectedness).

routines.name: python-contracts
routines.description: Runs only on repos with pyproject.toml/setup.py (affectedness).

routines.name: sql-safety
routines.description: Runs only on repos with SQL/migrations (affectedness).
